hero.title: Electrical Career Pathways
hero.subtitle: Get Qualified. Get Recognised.
hero.description: Whether you're new to the industry looking to train, or an experienced professional needing to qualify – we have a pathway that will suit your requirements.

comparison.title: Course Pathways Comparison
comparison.description: Below we have listed the various pathways available to help you achieve your electrical qualifications.
comparison.disclaimer: All pathways are delivered at our training centres in Clay Cross and Stirling.

process.title: Process
process.subtitle: Consultation with our course advisors
items: Your consultation is valid for 30 days. If you have not enrolled within 30 days, you will need to book a new consultation.
Depending on the pathway, you may need to submit evidence of previous qualifications or experience to meet eligibility criteria.
Our advisors will guide you through the best pathway for your career goals and experience level.

cta.title: Thinking About a Career Change?
cta.headline: Become a Qualified Electrician
cta.description: No prior electrical experience required. The UK needs skilled electricians, and Pathway 1 is designed specifically for adults looking to enter the industry.
benefits: Flexible training options to fit around your work

pathways.title: Electrical Career Starter
pathways.description: Comprehensive training route combining Total Electrical 20 package with 18th Edition and Inspection & Testing for new electricians.
pathways.attendance: Classroom attendance at our training centres

pathways.title: Industrial Electrical Fast Track
pathways.description: Fast-track your qualification with Total Industrial Electrical Maintenance 10 for those with some electrical experience.

pathways.title: Inspection & Testing
pathways.description: City & Guilds 2391-52 Initial and Periodic Inspection & Testing for qualified electricians.

pathways.title: AM2 Assessment
pathways.description: Achievement Measurement 2 practical assessment for electricians completing their qualification.

pathways.title: PLC & Automation
pathways.description: PLC 10 course for those looking to specialise in industrial automation and control systems.
